channel.title: Meta on Cats, Cables & Containers
channel.description: Recent content in Meta on Cats, Cables & Containers

item.title: Hello World: Why Cats, Cables & Containers
item.description:
This is the first post on Cats, Cables & Containers.

What you can expect here:

  • Containers and Kubernetes notes
  • Linux + networking deep dives
  • Homelab experiments
  • Clean write-ups with commands you can copy
